_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.444), SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.441).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.331). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [concepts, engineering, reverse] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.924, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.076 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Knowledge of reverse engineering concepts." and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.452 > STS 0.331 (gap +0.121). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [concepts, engineering, reverse]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].
